item_type: Check tag name field in Tag Creation screen
description: Testing tag name input validation including character types, length limits, bad words handling, and duplicate checking

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check default value
+ Position
+ Label of item
+ Default value
expected_result: Display correctly as design

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Set tag name with valid data
+ No symbols, only letters, number and spaces allowed
+ English characters
+ Half-width Japanese characters
+ Full-width Japanese characters
+ Another supported languages
+ Spaces characters
+ Max length -1
+ Max length
+ Min length
+ Min length +1
expected_result:
+ Set tag name successfully
+ Update DB correctly
+ Tag displays correctly in Tag management page / tag session / article content / published tag page

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Set tag name with bad words
+ Input bad word which has been defined in config file before but  has been removed from Config file already
expected_result:
+ Set tag name successfully
+ Update DB correctly
+ Tag displays correctly in Tag management page / tag session / article content / published tag page

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Set tag name with Bad words 
+ Input bad word which has been already defined in config file 
+ Input bad word which has been updated  in config file 
+ Input bad word which has been new-added  in config file
expected_result: Check if Bad words are removed from tag name (Base on spec)

item_type: Check tag description field in Tag Creation screen
description: Testing tag description input validation including character counting and various input types

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check default value
+ Position
+ Label of item
+ Default value
expected_result: Display correctly as design

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Set tag description with valid data
Check number of character counting remaining each time input below characters

+ NULL (Unrequired item)
+ Only spaces
+ Special characters, symbols, URL
+ Numbers
+ English characters
+ Half-width Japanese characters
+ Full-width Japanese characters
+ Another supported languages
+ Spaces characters  
+ Max length -1
+ Max length
+ Min length
+ Min length +1
expected_result:
+ Set tag description successfully
+ Update DB correctly
+ Number of remaining character displays correctly
+ Tag displays correctly in Tag management page / tag session / article content / published tag page

item_type: Check status list of tag in Tag Creation screen
description: Testing tag status management and its effect on tag display and operation

test_view_points.viewpoint:
+ In Tag management screen, create new tag
+ Set tag with status = 'active' / 'pending' / 'deleted'
+ Create page/article and set with that tag
expected_result:
+ In tag list, default status displays properly
+ Can set status for tag successfully
+ When set tag for page/article, tag is displayed and operated as spec

item_type: Check display of tag in tag section / tag component
description: Testing tag display behavior including status handling, ordering, and URL functionality

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check if no tags for special screen [base on requirement]
expected_result:
There are no Tags display
+ Message
+ Position
+ Format

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check if Tags has status= 'active'
expected_result:
Display correctly as designed:
+ Tag name
+ Position
+ Format

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check if Tags has status= 'pending' / 'deleted'
expected_result: Tags having status = 'pending' / 'deleted' are not displayed on Tags section [base on requirement]

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check if Tag name has length = Max length
expected_result:
Display correctly as designed:
+ Tag name: <tag name>
+ Truncate a string if 'Tag name' is longer than the specified number of characters
+ Position: <position of message>
+ Format:  <format, color>

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check order of Tags list
+ When there is only 1st order
+ When there is 2nd order: there are many Tags have same created date
expected_result:
+ When there is only 1st order, tag list is ordered by CREATED DATE DESC
+ When there is 2nd order, tag listed is ordered by ID ASC

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check URL of Tags
expected_result:
URL is correct:
+ URL displays when hovering mouse on tag name
+ Tag screen displays when clicking on tag
+ Tag screen opens on current tab [base on requirement]

item_type: Check display of tag when set tag in content of article...
description: Testing tag display within article content including limits, status handling, and URL functionality

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check when tag name contains in
+ Title
+ Content
expected_result:
Display correctly as designed
+ Tag name
+ Position
+ Format

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check limit number of tag when set tag in content

+ Check limit of the number of Tags if the number of Tags less than Maximum number of Tags
+ Check limit of the number of Tags if the number of Tags = Maximum number of Tags
+ Check limit of the number of Tags if the number of Tags more than Maximum number of Tags
+ Check the oldest / newest Tags display if there are more than Maximum number of Tags
expected_result:
Display correctly as designed

+ Tag name
+ Position
+ Format
+ Only the maximum number of Tags display

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check if Tags has status= 'active'
expected_result:
Display correctly as designed:
+ Tag name
+ Position
+ Format

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check if Tags has status= 'pending' / 'deleted'
expected_result: Tags having status = 'pending' / 'deleted' are not displayed on Tags content [base on requirement]

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check URL of Tags
expected_result:
URL is correct:
+ URL displays when hovering mouse on tag name
+ Tag screen displays when clicking on tag
+ Tag screen opens on current tab [base on requirement]

item_type:
Check tag screen when click on a tag name

Ex: https://domain/tags/tags-name
description: Testing tag page access and URL format verification

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check URL format
expected_result:
URL is correct:
+ URL: <format>

Eg: https://domain/tags/tags-name

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check access to tag page when

+ User has login session
+ User has no login session
expected_result: + Tags screen displays correctly

item_type: Check related articles in tag page
description: Testing related articles functionality including article status, content matching, and information display

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check article when status of article is published

+ In article there is no title / no content related to current Tag screen
+ Article has the title that contain 'Tag name' displays in the list
+ Article has the title that contain part of 'Tag name' Ex: Tag name: ABCD, Title: ABC
+ Article has the content that contain 'Tag name' displays in the list
+ Article has the content that contain part of 'Tag name' Ex: Tag name: ABCD, Content: ABC
+ Article has that tag
+ Article has not that tag
expected_result:
+ When there are no title / no content related to current tag, artilce is not displayed in tag page
+ When article is not set with that tag, artilce is not displayed in tag page
+ When there are title / content related to current tag, article displays correctly in tag page
+ When article is set with that tag, article is displayed in tag page

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check article when status of article is unpublished / publish in future

+ In article there is no title / no content related to current Tag screen
+ Article has the title that contain 'Tag name' displays in the list
+ Article has the title that contain part of 'Tag name' Ex: Tag name: ABCD, Title: ABC
+ Article has the content that contain 'Tag name' displays in the list
+ Article has the content that contain part of 'Tag name' Ex: Tag name: ABCD, Content: ABC
+ Article has that tag
+ Article has not that tag
expected_result: Artilce is not displayed in tag page

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check information of each related article

+ Thumbnail
+ Title, description, content...
+ URL
+ Published Date
+ Number of views
+ Category, tag information
+ Pagination
expected_result: Information of article displays the same with DB

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check open related articles

+ Click on article link
+ Click on Read more link
expected_result: In article page, tag is displayed properly
